attributes.title: Claude Code Cost & Usage

attributes.title: Clawker Networking
attributes.description: Per-source network telemetry: Envoy access logs (TLS-MITM L7), CoreDNS query log, eBPF egress sock decisions. Action pies use each source's own field (Envoy/eBPF action, CoreDNS rcode); values not normalized so each component's truth is visible. OS-primary: no Prometheus counters emitted for network telemetry today.

attributes.title: Claude Code Activity
attributes.description: Claude Code security activity audit: prompts, tooling, code editing, permissions, hooks, MCP, plugins — totals, distributions, and full event tables.
